'''Scri Oscuro''' was the [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] of the religious cult [[Zealots of Psusan/Legends|Zealots of Psusan]]. He used his position in the cult to hide his illegal ventures, though this led to a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] being placed on his head. The bounty was claimed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kalyn Farnmir/Legends|Kalyn Farnmir]] and her partner [[Cian Shee/Legends|Cian Shee]], whom the High Priest employed in his unsuccessful revenge plot against Farnmir.

==Biography==
[[File:KalynFarnmir1.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Scri Oscuro plotted vengance against Kalyn Farnmir (pictured).]]
Scri Oscuro was a criminal<ref name="DBNyrat">{{DB|character|nyratagira|Agira, Nyrat}}</ref> and the corrupt<ref name="DBKalyn" /> [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] of the [[Zealots of Psusan/Legends|Zealots of Psusan]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a fast-growing<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> [[Gender/Legends|female]]-empowering<ref name="Far Horizons">''[[Far Horizons]]''</ref> religious<ref name="CSWEZealots">{{CSWECite|III|369|Zealots of Psusan}}</ref> cult, prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Oscuro used his position of spiritual influence as a front for illegal ventures. After discovering the truth, several former cult members placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head. The bounty was claimed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kalyn Farnmir/Legends|Kalyn Farnmir]] and<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]]<ref name="DBKalyn" /> [[Cian Shee/Legends|Cian Shee]], and the cult leader was placed in [[Prison/Legends|prison]], from which he attempted to use his congregation contacts to get vengeance on the pair.<ref name="CSWE" /> Through a hefty [[Currency/Legends|sum]]<ref name="DBKalyn">{{DB|character|kalynfarnmir|Farnmir, Kalyn}}</ref> of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], he was able to lure Shee into his revenge plan.<ref name="CSWE" />

On<ref name="DBKalyn" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Complete Locations" /> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NECNote">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The events in Kalyn Farnmir's [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry show Agira's interrogation happening shortly before Farnmir meeting [[Cian Shee/Legends|Cian Shee]], which is shown in the film. Therefore, the events in the Databank entry must take place in 22 BBY.</ref> Farnmir was notified of the plot by an [[Information broker/Legends|informant]], causing her to arrange a meeting with Shee at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="DBKalyn" /> a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall and [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] in the planet's [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]].<ref name="CSWEOutlander">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> Farnmir arrived first and interrogated the cultist [[Nyrat Agira/Legends|Nyrat Agira]], who confirmed that Oscuro had done dealings with her partner and that he was on Coruscant. When Farnmir and Shee eventually left the club together, the bounty hunter tried to capture the slicer, but she was able to flee. Shee called off her deal with Oscuro, knowing that her former partner would expect an ambush.<ref name="DBKalyn" /> 

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Whats The Story entry example.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Scri Oscuro was introduced through the StarWars.com What's The Story? feature (example pictured)]]
Scri Oscuro was first mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Kalyn Farnmir, which was written by [[Hyperspace]] member [[Captain Yossarian|Benjamin Christopher Norton Dawe]] through the website's "[[What's The Story?]]" feature.<ref name="DBKalyn" /> The entry was posted alongside the second round of entries written though the feature on [[September 30]], [[2005]].<ref name="DBrwdate">{{SWArchive|url=databank/updates/news20050930.html|text=Hyperspace Presents: What's The Story, Round 2}}</ref> The character's name is derived from "scry," which means to predict the future using a [[Wikipedia:Crystal ball|crystal ball]], and "oscuro," which in the [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]] or [[Wikipedia:Italian language|Italian]] languages means dark or obsure.<ref name="Yossarian">{{Blog|Yossarian|3|Kalyn Farnmir and Romeo Treblanc - Better Late Than Never}}</ref>

Scri Oscuro's name is misspelled "Sri Oscuro" in Cian Shee's entries in the Databank<ref name="CSWEOutlander" /> and in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', a [[2008]] reference book written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] and [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="CSWECian">{{CSWECite|III|145|Shee, Cian}}</ref> The name is spelled correctly, however, in the book's entries for Oscuro and Nyrat Agira.<ref name="CSWE" /><ref name="CSWENyrat">{{CSWECite|I|14|Agira, Nyrat}}</ref>
